title: Sigma-class shuttle

The '''''Sigma''-class shuttle''' was a [[Koensayr Manufacturing/Legends|Koensayr Manufacturing]] [[Shuttle/Legends|shuttlecraft]] that was considered obsolete by [[2 ABY/Legends|2 ABY]], but continued to see use by [[Merchant/Legends|traders]] and criminals such as the [[Granse Confederacy]].

==Characteristics==
The ''Sigma''-class was a [[Shuttle/Legends|shuttle]] of inferior speed and power to the [[Lambda-class T-4a shuttle/Legends|''Lambda''-class T-4a shuttle]] fielded by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]].<ref name="AIR" />

The ''[[Mist Laden]]'', a highly-modified ''Sigma''-class shuttle, measured 21.6 [[Meter/Legends|meters]] in length, and was equipped with a Class 1 [[Hyperdrive/Legends|hyperdrive]] with Class 15 [[Backup hyperdrive|backup]], a [[Navigation computer/Legends|navigation computer]], [[Deflector shield/Legends|deflector shields]], [[Sensor/Legends|sensors]], four [[Standard month/Legends|months]]-worth of consumables, a [[Laser cannon/Legends|laser cannon]] and heavy [[Turbolaser/Legends|turbolaser]] cannon, and had a top [[Atmosphere/Legends|atmospheric]] speed of 1,000 [[Kilometer per hour/Legends|kilometers per hour]]. It was crewed by a pair each of [[Pilot/Legends|pilots]] and [[Gunner/Legends|gunners]], though it could operate with a single crewmember, and could additionally carry eight passengers and 100 [[Metric ton/Legends|metric tons]] of cargo.<ref name="AIR" />

==History==
Produced by component and [[Starship/Legends|starship]] manufacturer [[Koensayr Manufacturing/Legends|Koensayr]],<ref name="EGVV">''[[The Essential Guide to Vehicles and Vessels]]''</ref> the ''Sigma''-class was once popular, but was outclassed and largely replaced by craft such as the Imperial ''Lambda''-class shuttle [[Standard year/Legends|years]] before<ref name="AIR" /> [[2 ABY/Legends|2 ABY]].<ref name="Date">''[[Alliance Intelligence Reports]]'' takes place two [[Standard year/Legends|years]] after the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|destruction]] of the [[DS-1 Orbital Battle Station/Legends|Death Star]], which ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' dates to [[0 BBY/Legends|0 BBY]], two years before [[2 ABY/Legends|2 ABY]].</ref>

One modified ''Sigma''-class shuttle, the ''Mist Laden'', was owned by an [[Free-trader|independent trader]], and seized by the [[Gand/Legends|Gand]] [[Findsman/Legends|findsman]] [[Lu'daal-ud]] when he captured its prior owner. Undergoing further alterations by Lu'daal-ud's associates, it proved a reliable vessel, and was among the craft employed by the criminal organization the [[Granse Confederacy]], of which the Gand was a member.<ref name="AIR" />

==Behind the scenes==
The ''Sigma''-class shuttle was first mentioned in ''[[Alliance Intelligence Reports]]'', a [[1995]] supplement for [[West End Games]]' ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]''.<ref name="AIR" />
